zh.lifeSummary: 當Magdalene Elsick於1538年2月1日出生在英國素瑞霍利時，她的父親Frederick Elsick38歲，母親Mary Hackney36歲。她於1558年11月14日與William Browne在英國素瑞霍利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1604年9月7日在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞霍利。

zh-hans.Inkberrow, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾音可貝洛
zh-hans.Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland distr: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magdalene Elsick于1538年2月1日出生在英国素瑞霍利时，她的父亲Frederick Elsick38岁，母亲Mary Hackney36岁。她于1558年11月14日与William Browne在英国素瑞霍利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1604年9月7日在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞霍利。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Magdalene Elsick was born on 1 February 1538, in Horley, Surrey, England, her father, Frederick Elsick, was 38 and her mother, Mary Hackney, was 36. She married William Browne on 14 November 1558, in Horley, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 7 September 1604, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Horley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magdalene Elsick est née le 1 février 1538, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Frederick Elsick, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary Hackney, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé William Browne le 14 novembre 1558, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 septembre 1604, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magdalene Elsick am 1. Februar 1538 in Horley, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frederick Elsick 38 und ihre Mutter Mary Hackney 36. Sie hat am 14. November 1558 in Horley, Surrey, England William Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. September 1604 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Horley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Elsick è nata il il 1 febbraio 1538 nel Horley, Surrey, England, sua padre, Frederick Elsick, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mary Hackney, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato William Browne il 14 novembre 1558, nel Horley, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1604, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Horley, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Magdalene Elsickが1538年2月1日にイギリススリーホールリーで生まれた時，父Frederick Elsickは38歳，母Mary Hackneyは36歳であった。1558年11月14日にイギリススリーホールリーでWilliam Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1604年9月7日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーホールリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magdalene Elsick(이)가 1538년 2월 1일 영국 수리 호를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frederick Elsick(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Hackney(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1558년 11월 14일 영국 수리 호를리에서 William Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1604년 9월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 호를리에 묻혔다.

pt.1 February 1538–7 September 1604: 1 de fevereiro de 1538–7 de setembro de 1604
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Elsick nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1538, em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Frederick Elsick, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Hackney, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com William Browne em 14 de novembro de 1558, em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1604, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magdalene Elsick родилась 1 февраля 1538 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Frederick Elsick было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Hackney, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Browne 14 ноября 1558 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 7 сентября 1604 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 February 1538–7 September 1604: 1 de febrero de 1538–7 de septiembre de 1604
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magdalene Elsick nació el 1 de febrero de 1538, en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Frederick Elsick, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary Hackney, tenía 36 años. Se casó con William Browne el 14 de noviembre de 1558, en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1604, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
